events.description: Start your morning with a refreshing yoga flow surrounded by blooming ranunculus fields.

events.description: An evening yoga session at the orchard designed to help you unwind during the golden hour.

events.title: Rooftop Candlelit Pilates
events.description: A serene evening session of candlelit Pilates and meditation followed by wellness shots and juices.

events.title: Sunrise Spring Yoga
events.description: A sunrise yoga practice located in the heart of the historic orchard's flower fields.

events.title: Sunrise Spring Yoga
events.description: An early morning yoga flow surrounded by blooming ranunculus flowers in the historic orchard.

events.title: Sunset Spring Yoga
events.description: Unwind with a sunset yoga practice set against the beautiful backdrop of the spring orchard.

events.title: Swing Dance Night at The Coffee Note
events.description: Ready to shake off those weekday blues and step into something effortlessly cool? This Friday brings the perfect blend of vintage charm and modern energy with live jazz, beginner-friendly dance lessons, and that intimate coffee house atmosphere that makes every night feel like a scene from your favorite film.

events.title: Sunset Spring Yoga
events.description: A golden hour yoga session at the orchard perfect for unwinding among the spring flower fields.

events.title: Mats and Margaritas: DIY Doormat Workshop
events.location: Board & Brush Creative Studio - Centennial Hills
events.description: Picture this: you, your favorite people, and the perfect blend of creativity and cocktails as you craft a custom doormat that'll make every guest jealous before they even step inside. This intimate workshop combines hands-on DIY magic with that celebratory margarita energy we all need more of in our lives.

events.title: Mats and Margaritas: DIY Doormat Workshop
events.description: This perfectly crafted afternoon combines creative expression with social sipping as you design a custom doormat that'll make your guests smile before they even knock. It's the kind of hands-on experience that feeds your soul while giving you something gorgeous to take home – plus, the margaritas don't hurt either.

events.title: Pilates Pool Party
events.description: Get Fit event with cardio splash, pool deck Pilates, and food.

events.title: Yoga in the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Mindset x Movement: Run Into The New Season
events.description: Join a curated running collective for an invigorating morning that perfectly balances mindful movement with the fresh energy of a new season. This isn't just another group run—it's your invitation to connect with like-minded souls while setting intentions that will carry you beautifully into what's next.

events.title: Girls Paint at the Park
events.description: Elevated outdoor paint experience with mocktails and a floral bar.

events.title: Black People Hike LV: State of the Trail Civic Unity Hike
events.description: Join this meaningful community gathering that combines the healing power of nature with important civic dialogue as you explore the scenic trails of Lone Mountain. It's a beautiful opportunity to connect with like-minded hikers while engaging in thoughtful conversations about our community's future in one of Vegas's most stunning outdoor settings.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Clay & Chisme
events.description: Join us for the perfect blend of creativity and conversation at The Pottery Shop, where you'll get your hands dirty crafting beautiful ceramics while sharing stories and secrets with fellow creatives. It's the kind of evening where meaningful connections are made over messy clay and flowing chisme — exactly what your soul needs right now.

events.title: Plant Bingo
events.description: Get ready for the most delightfully unexpected evening where your love for greenery meets the thrill of bingo in Vegas' coziest plant haven. This isn't your grandmother's bingo night – it's where plant parents and curious souls gather for an evening of friendly competition, botanical prizes, and the kind of authentic connections that make this city feel like home.

events.title: Saturno Pilates
events.description: This isn't your typical studio session—it's a transformative Pilates experience set against the eclectic backdrop of Electric Mushroom, where wellness meets Vegas' creative underground. Trust us when we say this fusion of mindful movement and artistic atmosphere will leave you feeling both centered and inspired in ways you never expected.

events.title: The Zodiac Series: Aries Pilates
events.description: Channel your fiery Aries energy with an invigorating Pilates session designed specifically for the bold and determined ram, set against the stunning backdrop of BLVD Rooftop. This celestial-inspired workout combines the intensity Aries craves with mindful movement that will leave you feeling as powerful and radiant as the stars themselves.

events.title: Body Butter Workshop - Better Days
events.description: Learn the art of creating luxurious, nourishing body butters in this hands-on workshop that's perfect for anyone looking to elevate their self-care routine with handcrafted wellness. This intimate experience will have you blending natural ingredients like a pro while connecting with fellow wellness enthusiasts who share your passion for clean beauty and mindful living.

events.title: Romanticize Your Pilates
events.description: This dreamy Pilates experience transforms your usual workout into something utterly enchanting, blending mindful movement with an atmosphere that feels like pure self-care luxury. Trust me, this is the kind of session that leaves you feeling both beautifully stretched and completely renewed – exactly what your spring wellness routine has been missing.

events.title: The Art of Cake
events.description: Picture this: a gathering where fellow cake enthusiasts come together to share their most treasured recipes and creations in the cozy, design-forward space that is Uncommons. It's the kind of delightfully unexpected afternoon where you'll discover your new favorite bakery secret, swap stories behind family recipes, and leave with both a satisfied sweet tooth and genuine new connections.

events.title: PopStroke Las Vegas X Move With Madi
events.description: Picture this: a perfect Vegas morning where you'll flow through an energizing workout with the incredible Madi, then unwind with mini golf and mimosas at the most Instagram-worthy spot in town. This is that rare combination of wellness and play that leaves you feeling both accomplished and completely refreshed – trust me, you'll want to clear your Saturday for this one.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Rooftop Soundbath & Yoga
events.description: Picture yourself flowing through gentle yoga poses as the sun sets over the Vegas skyline, then melting into pure bliss during a healing soundbath under the stars. This rooftop sanctuary experience combines movement, meditation, and those magical desert views that make you feel like you've discovered the city's best-kept wellness secret.

events.title: Spring Fling Bachata Class & Social
events.description: Have you been interested in learning a few moves to spice up your bachata? This event is perfect balace of instruction and application. No registration or cover needed. Drink specials are available from 5-6pm.

events.title: Strings By the Sunset
events.description: Picture this: an intimate evening where classical strings meet golden hour magic at Ferguson's Downtown, creating the kind of atmospheric moment that feels both sophisticated and soul-stirring. This is exactly the type of curated musical experience where you'll find yourself completely transported, surrounded by fellow culture enthusiasts who appreciate the finer moments in life.

events.title: Restore & Replenish Retreat
events.description: A full women's wellness retreat focused on reconnecting with self.

events.title: Sistas Y Hermanas Black & Brown Unity Hike
events.description: Join this powerful celebration of Black and Brown sisterhood as we connect with nature and each other on the scenic Hoover Dam Trail, where breathtaking views meet meaningful conversations. It's the kind of soul-nourishing experience that reminds you why community and wellness go hand in hand—plus you'll discover one of Nevada's most stunning hiking spots through the eyes of incredible women.

events.title: Skye Canyon Pickleball Social
events.description: Whether you're curious about the fastest-growing sport in America or ready to compete, this community gathering offers the perfect introduction to pickleball with free clinics, novice and intermediate tournaments, plus food trucks to fuel the fun. It's that rare event where you can learn something new, break a sweat, and connect with fellow Las Vegans all in one beautiful morning at the park.

events.title: Pool-Lates: Pilates at Hideout Pool
events.description: Picture this: you're flowing through your favorite Pilates moves while floating on water, surrounded by the luxe vibes of Golden Nugget's stunning pool deck. It's the kind of workout that makes you feel like you've discovered the ultimate wellness secret – equal parts challenging and utterly rejuvenating.

events.title: Beginner Yoga in the Park with Hustle & Yoga Flow
events.description: There's something magical about flowing through gentle poses under the open sky, and this beginner-friendly session with Hustle & Yoga Flow is the perfect way to ease into your wellness journey while soaking up Hollywood Park's serene atmosphere. Trust me, you'll leave feeling both grounded and energized, plus you'll discover that yoga outdoors hits completely differently than any studio class ever could.

events.title: Breath & Beats: Yoga With a DJ
events.description: Most yoga classes stick to predictable playlists, but this one features a live DJ reading the room and mixing beats that actually sync with your flow transitions. At just $10, it's the kind of accessible luxury that makes you wonder why more studios don't elevate the experience this thoughtfully.

events.title: Formation Haus Soft Opening with Pilates Activations
events.description: This isn't just another studio launch party with mimosas and Instagram backdrops—Formation Haus is debuting with actual Pilates classes woven throughout their soft opening, letting you experience their teaching style and equipment quality before committing to a membership. At $50, you're getting first access to sample what could become your new movement sanctuary, plus the chance to secure founding member rates if their approach resonates with how you want to move your body.

events.title: Chair Fitness with The Overcoming Warriors Club
events.description: Join The Overcoming Warriors Club for an empowering chair fitness session that proves movement is for every body, regardless of mobility or fitness level. This inclusive workout at Sheree Michelle Fitness Studio creates a supportive community where strength meets accessibility, and you'll leave feeling accomplished and energized.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Pilates and Praise
events.description: There's something absolutely magical about combining mindful movement with uplifting music as the sun sets over the park, and this unique fusion class delivers exactly that soul-nourishing experience you've been craving. Trust me when I say this isn't your typical workout. It's a beautiful blend of Pilates flow and faith based vibes that will leave you feeling both physically strengthened and spiritually renewed.

events.title: Aprende Conmigo: The Matcha Experience
events.description: Dive deep into the ancient art of matcha with this immersive experience that'll have you whisking like a true tea ceremony master in no time. This is your chance to discover the meditative ritual behind every perfect cup while connecting with fellow wellness enthusiasts who appreciate life's most refined pleasures.

events.title: Driven & Defined: A Land Rover x TruFusion Pilates Experience
events.description: This is an exclusive Pilates session that perfectly marries luxury automotive elegance with mindful movement, hosted in the sleek showroom of Land Rover Las Vegas where you'll flow alongside their stunning vehicles. This isn't just any wellness class—it's a curated experience where TruFusion's expert instructors guide you through a rejuvenating practice that embodies the same precision and strength as the iconic cars surrounding you.

events.title: Horses X Pilates
events.description: Elevated morning combining horses and Pilates movement.

events.title: Las Vegas Black Rodeo
events.description: The Hottest Shows on Dirt featuring the 2026 Black Rodeo USA season.
